handoffReply: Got it - I have shared this with the owner and you will get a reply shortly.
fallbackReply: Thanks for reaching out. Are you asking about pricing, availability, booking, or delivery?

faqs.label: Pricing
faqs.answer: Portrait sessions start at $90, brand shoots start at $150, and event coverage starts at $300.
faqs.cta: If you want an exact quote, send the service you need and your preferred date.

faqs.label: Availability
faqs.answer: We currently take bookings on weekdays and Saturdays based on availability.
faqs.cta: Send your preferred date and service and I can help you check the next open slot.

faqs.label: Delivery Area
faqs.answer: We currently serve clients across Lagos mainland and the island.
faqs.cta: If you have a specific area in mind, send it and I will confirm.

faqs.label: Booking
faqs.answer: To book, send the service you want, your preferred date, and any important details for the session.
faqs.cta: Once I have that, I can pass it along for confirmation.

faqs.label: Turnaround
faqs.answer: Standard turnaround is 5 business days after the session.
faqs.cta: If you need a rush timeline, mention it and the owner can confirm.

faqs.label: Refund Policy
faqs.answer: Deposits are non-refundable, but one reschedule is allowed with at least 48 hours notice.
faqs.cta: If your situation is unusual, I can flag it for the owner.
